feedback.details: Syntax appears valid, but requires validation against Mermaid CLI v10.2.0+ with both light and dark themes. UpdateLayoutConfig on line 73 is correctly formatted. No obvious syntax errors detected.

Contains exactly 1 System (line 58), 2 Persons (lines 55-56), and 4 Container_Ext elements (lines 60-63). File claims these match PRD Integrations, but verification against actual PRD content required. Note: Line 27-28 explicitly excludes LLM services claiming they are not in PRD Integrations.

Components cite PRD sections (lines 78-97). However, cannot verify that every PRD 'Integrations' requirement is represented without access to the PRD. References [PRD 10.1], [PRD 6.2], [PRD 12], [PRD 5], [PRD 1] are cited throughout.

Element-to-PRD table present (lines 89-97). Word count exceeds 200 words. Dedicated paragraphs explaining 'why' each dependency is necessary appear at lines 35-48 and 101-127. Meets all structural requirements.

Relationship Details table (lines 78-85) specifies Direction, Protocol, and Authentication for all connections. Diagram arrows match table directions: Developer→LlmSwitch (line 65), LlmSwitch→Prometheus (line 68), LlmSwitch↔Consul (line 69), LlmSwitch→Vault (line 70), LlmSwitch→Orchestration (line 71).

Demonstrates awareness of hallucination prevention. Lines 27-33 explicitly explain why LLM services, OpenAPI compatibility, and Anthropic compatibility are not shown as external containers. Only includes containers explicitly claimed to be in PRD 'Integrations'. No extra containers detected.

System boundary correctly encloses only LlmSwitch (line 58). All external dependencies (Prometheus, Consul, Vault, Orchestration) use Container_Ext and are outside the boundary. No external containers drawn inside system boundary.

Three relationship labels exceed 25 character limit: line 66 'Deploys, monitors, maintains system' (35 chars), line 69 'Service discovery via DNS/HTTP' (28 chars), line 70 'Retrieves secrets via AppRole' (27 chars). All must be <= 25. Person names use correct Sentence case (lines 55-56). Containers use correct PascalCase (lines 58-63).

Frontmatter includes sprint_number: 1 (line 2) and sprint_name (line 3). No inline HTML detected. No tabs detected (appears to use spaces). All lines appear to be <= 120 characters (longest table row at line 87 is 114 chars).

overall_summary: The architecture file demonstrates solid C4 Level 1 structure with proper boundary integrity and careful avoidance of hallucinated elements. The narrative meets depth requirements with comprehensive 'why' explanations for dependencies. However, three relationship labels violate the 25-character maximum limit (lines 66, 69, 70), constituting a High severity issue. The file makes accurate claims about PRD traceability but requires verification against the actual PRD 'Integrations' section to confirm completeness. Mermaid syntax requires CLI validation but appears structurally sound.
